text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While passing behind the academy building, I
happen upon Nice Nature having a discussion
with some friends.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wahey! It's Nature's trainer! Bruh, this is a
super-lucky spawn! Someone grab a phone. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So right now, we're, like, about to make a video
message for Nature's little bro! Could you help
out and shoot it for us?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their double bombardment leaves me no room to
refuse. Before I know it, I'm holding a smartphone
and ready to record.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, what's the best way to cheer on someone
who's learning to ride a tricycle? Maybe we
should all shout something together...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Don't you remember? We tried that and the result was so vanilla. A message from just his beloved big sis would be totally on point!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I know it's for your bro, but not gonna lie, I'm
pretty surprised you're doing something like this! I
thought you hated mushy stuff.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll admit this isn't my usual style... But the
power of cheering is nothing to sniff at, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Think about when you hear your name being
called out during a race. It really makes you want
to give your best.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Sometimes I feel like getting cheered on can
only help so much, but it's also true that those
cheers are kinda motivating.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So I thought if I got the two most enthusiastic
people I know involved, we'd be able to make a
really encouraging video together...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: No cap! For real, our vibes are hundo P in sync right now! When everyone's hyping you up, you literally get hyped up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Omg, totes! Nature wants to support her bro the same way her fans support her!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Real talk, we gotta cook with this one! Let's use
Nature's feels to boost the festi-vibes! ☆ Wahey!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Okay! We'll make Nature's cheer clip incredible!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah, r-right!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Aaand we're ready!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Time to film Nature's straight fire feels mode
high-key hype festi-vibing vid! Wahey!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Are these two serious?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Um, thanks... Wait. Wait, wait! What are we
exactly trying to achieve by sending my brother a
video of me in a cheerleader outfit?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
The visuals are the first step towards bringing the
hype! You'll be fine. That fit's fire! Fax, no printer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Once he sees how real your cheers are, your bro
will do his best, too! Like, no doubt! Okay, so
how should you actually cheer for him?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like, if this vid was for you, Trainer, how would
you like to be cheered on?
choice_data_list: With some cute and cheerful encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Sisterly? I never dress like this at home, though...
Well, I guess I'll do the best I can...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. ...So I heard you're practicing real hard on
that tricycle. That's some impressive dedication!
Your big sis is super proud!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You work way harder than me, so I'm sure you'll
be triking around in no time, but your hopeless sis
wants to cheer you on anyway.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Give it your best! You got this! Don't be scared!
Your big sis is with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You... You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Geez, I can't keep this up. I'm starting to lose
track of the real me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...Sweet! This is actually so good! Your aura's on
another level!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
No cap, this could go high-key viral! Hey, mind if
I throw it on UmaTok?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait, but isn't that totally at odds with my whole
deal?! Besides, who'd even enjoy watching
something like that?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I bet your trainer would get way hyped watching
it! I'm telling you, it'll slap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Totes! And your bro's totally gonna love it too!
C'mon, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh, fine! I get it. I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'm the one who was talking about the
power of cheers in the first place...
One, two, three...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Go! You can do it! ♪ You can do it! ♪ Tricycles
are nothing to fear! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Go! Right foot! ♪ Go! Left foot! ♪ Push those
pedals! ♪ Push on forward! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ride that trike! ♪ You can do it! Yeahhh! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...Sweet! This is actually so good! Your aura's on
another level!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
No cap, this could go high-key viral! Hey, mind if
I throw it on UmaTok?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: High-key no.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Those two helped out a lot, and we did finish the
video... but can I really send this? My brother's
going to laugh so hard if he watches it when he's
older...
choice_data_list: You're not going to send it, then?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...No, I'll send it. This is probably going to come
back to haunt me, though...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
All four of us put our cheers into it, right? I think
it'll really encourage my brother.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature watches her video with a subtle hint
of pride. It looks like this was a valuable
experience for her!
